votes.rationale: motion-0047 wires the first live consumer of model-slots-phase1.yaml. The loadSlots function in panel-run.mjs now merges Phase 1 live slots over legacy slots when the file is present. Librarian panel scaffolded successfully with all 10 live slots resolved from the Phase 1 manifest. Minimal edit, no config files changed, no selector logic activated.

The edit is tightly scoped to one function in one file. Phase 1 overlay is additive and non-breaking — if the Phase 1 file is absent, behavior is identical to before. The split-brain state is intentional and bounded. The 5-candidate panel structure in agent-panels.yaml is correctly left untouched per the motion scope.

The Phase 1 staffing canon now has a proven live consumer. The resolution pattern in loadSlots is reusable for subsequent panel wiring motions. Execution matched the motion spec exactly: one function extended, no config files modified, Librarian resolution validated.
